bead.title: Add GitHub Actions binary release artifacts
bead.description:
Add a GitHub Actions workflow that builds distributable heimq binaries. The workflow should support workflow_dispatch and tag pushes (for example v*), build the heimq binary in release mode, upload artifacts with clear names, and produce SHA256 checksums. Prefer a small matrix that at least covers Linux x86_64; add macOS/aarch64 only if the repo already has an established cross-build pattern or the implementation can validate it cleanly. Keep this focused on binaries, not containers.

In-scope files:
- .github/workflows/release-binaries.yml (new)
- scripts/release/* or packaging/* only if needed for reusable checksum/archive steps
- crates/heimq/README.md only if it needs a short artifact download note

Out-of-scope:
- Docker image build/publish.
- Helm chart work.
- Publishing a GitHub Release unless this can be done with a standard action and is fully documented.
bead.acceptance:
1. `cargo build -p heimq --release` passes.
2. `test -x target/release/heimq && sh -c 'if command -v sha256sum >/dev/null 2>&1; then sha256sum target/release/heimq; else shasum -a 256 target/release/heimq; fi'` prints a checksum for the built binary.
3. `test -f .github/workflows/release-binaries.yml && rg -n "workflow_dispatch|tags:|upload-artifact|sha256|cargo build -p heimq --release|target/release/heimq" .github/workflows/release-binaries.yml` confirms dispatch/tag triggers, artifact upload, checksum handling, and the release build command are present.
